case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ALBERT GIUGNINO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL DOCUMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF, IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT
